name: The Freight House and Root Cellar
description: A long timber building beside the rail spur, smelling of sawdust, axle grease, and something damp from below — the root cellar access is a trapdoor beneath a stack of empty crates, invisible unless you know to look.
atmosphericDetails: The trapdoor hinges have been oiled recently — they make no sound.
Three bedrolls are arranged in the cellar, two adult-sized and one small, still holding the warmth of recent occupation.
A lantern with a red glass panel hangs on a nail beside the trapdoor — the signal color for danger.
